properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v6 v6 v6 v3 v5 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Woah, the King broke chains off me Your love has set me free Now all I can do is dance Woah, the walls came crashing down With one word from your mouth Now all I can do is dance

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are redeemed, set free forgiven We are the chosen, we are the living We are redeemed, set free forgiven So if you love Him, sing, sing!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh! Praise You Lord, Praise You Lord For You are good, You are good Forever we will dance and sing For You are good, You are good

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Woah, Your love rescued me I live in victory Now all I can do is dance

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Praise You Lord, Praise You Lord For You are good, You are good Forever we will dance and sing For You are good, You are good

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Whom the Son sets free is free indeed Whom the Son sets free has liberty Your love has taken chains off me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You are good You are good
